name: linkedin-post-writer
description: Convert blog posts to native LinkedIn posts (text + 7-10 slide carousel), 2026 algorithm-optimized. 5 skills + 1 agent: brief router, text post writer, carousel composer with per-slide image prompts, Depth Score validator (>=80 gate), and end-to-end orchestrator. 12 text hook formulas, 5 cover hook frameworks, 20-rule anti-slop rubric. v0.4.6 splits per-slide copy into TWO required fields: `copy_id` (Indonesian rendered as image main headline, white #FFFFFF, ALL CAPS) + `copy_en` (English rendered as subtitle, golden #F5A623, ALSO canonical for Depth Score scoring + banned-phrase scanning). Adds per-layout-hint length invariants (cover 40-180 chars, body 80-260, human_fingerprint 120-320, direct_answer 60-240, cta 100-320) — fixes the v0.4.5 cover-bloat regression where uniform 10-420 range allowed 30-word multi-sentence covers. Anti-slop scan now hits both languages (catches direct-translation slop like 'menyelami' for 'delve into'). v0.4.5 retained: 3:4 (1080×1440) cross-platform-reuse canvas. v0.4.4 retained: 5-act narrative spine HOOK → FORESHADOW → BODY → PEAK → CTA + nyentrik mandate. v0.4.3 retained: top-level caption + hashtags + link_comment. Pure content generation — emits draft JSON for an admin panel to consume.
